title: Vegan Delight Cheese Fritters
description: A crispy and savory fritter recipe made with a delightful vegan cheese alternative and served as a snack.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, combine the delight, flour, water, salt, and herbs. Mix until smooth.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy!
